description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a prominent L-shaped layout, featuring a main building and an attached garage wing. The roof is primarily gabled with multiple intersecting sections, and the exterior walls are finished in a light color with contrasting dark roofing. The front facade includes a covered entryway supported by columns, flanked by tall, narrow windows and decorative landscaping. The rear of the house opens to a backyard area with a rectangular swimming pool and a paved patio, complemented by several lounge chairs and palm trees. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, with arched and rectangular shapes providing architectural interest. The property is surrounded by a driveway, additional greenery, and a fence, giving it a private, upscale residential feel.
description: A large, L-shaped two-story suburban house with a gabled roof, attached garage, covered entryway, and a backyard pool area. The exterior features symmetrical windows, columns, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, attached garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, patio area, lounge chairs, and palm trees.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long facade with symmetrical windows, arched details, and the transition to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, driveway extension, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with columns, steps, and a prominent front door
